flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 23 pp at Iowa Lakes Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (25.8% vs 48.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Iowa Lakes Community College fell 10% between 2006 and 2009 (48.2% → 43.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Iowa Lakes Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Iowa Lakes Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (51.4% → 60.9%).
